summary: Frontend testing of Sahi Margin dashboard app. All core features verified - dashboard KPI cards, orders table, navigation, platform badges, and page routing all working correctly.

issues: Badge displays as 'FLIPK ART' with apparent word break in low-res screenshot. Programmatically confirmed whitespace-nowrap is applied and single-line height (21.75px) - likely a screenshot compression artifact at 40% quality. No actual wrapping issue detected.

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes present on key elements - good testability
All prices correctly use ₹ symbol via formatINR helper
Platform badges have whitespace-nowrap applied correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 test scenarios passed. Dashboard KPIs (₹12,450 revenue, ₹3,200 profit, 24 orders, 3 alerts) all display correctly. 6 order rows with Indian products present. All 5 sidebar nav links work and route correctly (/calculator, /orders, /inventory, /connect). Rahul Sharma user avatar visible in sidebar. Profit Calculator shows input fields with ₹ symbol. Connect Store shows 5 platform cards. Active nav link has orange highlight. Platform badges have correct colors and no wrapping.
